# Spotless Scrubbers

> Professional house cleaning service in Los Angeles County, California. Eco-friendly, insured, 5-star rated.

## About

Spotless Scrubbers is a professional cleaning company serving all of Los Angeles County since 2023. Founded and owned by Dominic, we provide residential and commercial cleaning services with eco-friendly, non-toxic products. Every cleaner is background-checked, trained, and insured. We have a 5.0 star rating on Google with 29 reviews.

## Services & Pricing

- Standard House Cleaning: $120 - $250
- Deep House Cleaning: $200 - $450
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning: $250 - $500
- Post-Construction Cleaning: $300 - $700
- Commercial & Office Cleaning: $150 - $500
- Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning: $100 - $300

All prices depend on home size, number of bedrooms/bathrooms, and scope of work. Free quotes provided.

## Service Areas

We serve 20+ cities across Los Angeles County including:
Los Angeles, Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, West Hollywood, Burbank, Glendale, Pasadena, Long Beach, Torrance, Culver City, Inglewood, Downey, Whittier, Pomona, West Covina, Alhambra, El Monte, Norwalk, Compton, Hawthorne.

- Phone: (424) 677-1146

## Key Features

- Eco-friendly, non-toxic cleaning products
- Licensed, insured, and bonded
- Background-checked cleaners
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Same-day and next-day availability
- 24/7 booking availability
- Flat-rate pricing, no hidden fees
